notes: Evening run (~21:16 UTC, Sunday 19 July), ~14.5h after the previous run (06:45Z). CYCLING — MAJOR GC EVENT: Jonas Vingegaard (2nd on GC) CRASHED OUT of the Tour on stage 15 (~21 km to go, Plateau de Solaison) with a fractured collarbone — his first-ever Grand Tour DNF. CONFIRMED by 4+ independent sources (cyclingnews, NBC Sports, cyclinguptodate, The National). The recurring scout headlines about a Vingegaard crash were CORRECT but referred to stage 15, not stage 14. Stage 15 won by Remco Evenepoel (beat Pogačar in the summit sprint), del Toro 3rd (+6s). New GC (3 sources agree): Pogačar yellow, Evenepoel +5:00, Isaac del Toro +5:58 (takes WHITE from Seixas), Paul Seixas +6:23, Florian Lipowitz +6:48; best Norwegian Tobias Halland Johannessen ~13th–14th (~+14:50, exact placing soft — PCS returned 403 at scout time). Green Mads Pedersen (417 pts), polka-dot Pogačar. NO new Norwegian abandons — all six Norwegians (Uno-X quartet + Tobias/Anders Halland Johannessen + Per Strand Hagenes) still racing; stage-15 DNFs were Vingegaard/Merlier/Van Asbroeck, none Norwegian. Amended stage-15 summary (result) and stage-16 'Nå' summary (fresh GC). Monday 20 July = second rest day; stage 16 ITT Tue 21 July start 11:00 UTC re-confirmed (cyclingstage). Tobias's exact GC rank is the one soft spot — verify should re-read PCS to lock it.
